title: Orchestrator Task Manifest
description: Defines a set of tasks for the orchestrator to execute, with dependencies and parallel grouping.

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the spec.md file for this project

architecture_path.description: Absolute path to architecture.md, if one exists

status.description: Top-level plan status (R-27 / plan-index classifier). Optional for manifests that inherit status from spec.md, required for manifests acting as the plan's status anchor.

description.description: 2-4 sentence description of what the task accomplishes

file_references.description: Absolute paths the worker should read before starting

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task starts

parallel_group.description: Tasks sharing a parallel_group run simultaneously. Must not share file_references.

allowed_tools.description: Tool names passed to --allowedTools. Empty means all tools allowed.
